title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet: The New Default That Outperforms GPT-4o?
description: Dive deep into Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Anthropic's latest AI model, exploring its features, performance against GPT-4o, and what makes it a leading choice. This breakdown covers its speed, massive context window, coding prowess, and where it truly shines, along with its honest limitations and pricing.
